Ingredients:

1 cup all-purpose flour

1 cup brown sugar

1/2 cup granulated sugar

1/2 cup butter, softened

1 egg

1 teaspoon vanilla extract

1 cup semisweet chocolate chips

Instructions:

1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).

2. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

3. In a large bowl, combine the flour, brown sugar, granulated sugar, butter, egg, and vanilla extract.

4. Stir until well combined.

5. Fold in the chocolate chips.

6. Drop the dough by rounded tablespoons onto the prepared baking sheet.

7. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown and the centers are set.

8. Let cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely. I have a question for you... I bet it is!

Ingredients:

1 pound lasagna noodles
1 pound ground beef
1 pound Italian sausage
1 (28 ounce) can crushed tomatoes
2 (15 ounce) cans tomato sauce
1 (10 ounce) can tomato soup
1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese
1/2 cup ricotta cheese
1/2 cup grated mozzarella cheese
1/2 cup chopped onion
1/2 cup chopped green bell pepper
1/2 cup chopped red bell pepper
1/4 cup chopped fresh basil
1/4 teaspoon dried oregano
1/4 teaspoon salt
1/8 teaspoon black pepper

Instructions:

1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
2. In a large skillet, brown the ground beef and Italian sausage. Drain excess fat.
3. Stir in the crushed tomatoes, tomato sauce, tomato soup, Parmesan cheese, ricotta cheese, mozzarella cheese, onion, green bell pepper, red bell pepper, basil, oregano, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
4. In a 9x13 inch baking dish, spread 1/3 of the sauce mixture. Top with a layer of lasagna noodles. Repeat layers, ending with a layer of sauce.
5. Cover the lasagna with foil and bake for 30 minutes. Remove the foil and bake for an additional 20 minutes, or until the noodles are cooked through and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
